title: Recursion vs Enum: rewrite an awkward Enum.reduce as explicit recursion
prompt: Refactor `MyApp.Accumulators.group_by_parity/1` from test_fixtures/enum_reduce_awkward.ex. The current reduce uses `acc.evens ++ [x]` — O(n²). Rewrite as explicit recursion with prepend-and-reverse: two function heads on the list, an accumulator tuple `{evens, odds}`, and a final clause that reverses and packages into a map. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Accumulators do ... end` with just `group_by_parity/1` and its helper.
tier_rationale: Requires judging that explicit recursion is clearer when Enum.reduce with map-update syntax becomes O(n²).
